testcase.name: Route Navigation - Critical Paths › should navigate to /dashboard and render page
Route Navigation - Critical Paths › /dashboard should have accessible main content area

Sidebar Persistence › sidebar collapse state persists across navigation
testcase.error:
[chromium] › critical-path.e2e.ts:73:7 › Sidebar Persistence › sidebar collapse state persists across navigation
Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
Error: locator.click: Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('[data-testid="sidebar-toggle"]').first()
87 | 88 | // Collapse sidebar > 89 | await collapseButton.click(); | ^ 90 | await page.waitForTimeout(300); // Wait for animation 91 | 92 | // Verify collapsed (narrower or hidden) at /Users/bradygeorgen/Developer/story-agent/packages/ui/src/__tests__/critical-path.e2e.ts:89:26

testcase.name: Sidebar Persistence › sidebar navigation items are clickable
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › critical-path.e2e.ts:122:7 › Sidebar Persistence › sidebar navigation items are clickable
Error: expect(received).not.toContain(expected) // indexOf
Expected substring: not "/dashboard" Received string: "http://localhost:3000/dashboard"

testcase.name: Theme Switching › theme toggle switches between LCARS, dark, and light
Theme Switching › dark mode is visually distinct from light mode
VSCode Sync Integration › chat messages from VSCode appear in web UI
Error Handling › gracefully handles server unavailable
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › critical-path.e2e.ts:270:7 › Error Handling › gracefully handles server unavailable ─
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('[data-testid="error-message"]').or(locator('text=/unavailable|error|failed/i')).first() Expected: visible Timeout: 5000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('[data-testid="error-message"]').or(locator('text=/unavailable|error|failed/i')).first()
281 | .or(page.locator('text=/unavailable|error|failed/i')).first(); 282 | > 283 | await expect(errorMessage).toBeVisible({ timeout: 5000 }); | ^ 284 | }); 285 | 286 | test('recovers when server comes back online', async ({ page }) => { at /Users/bradygeorgen/Developer/story-agent/packages/ui/src/__tests__/critical-path.e2e.ts:283:32

testcase.name: Error Handling › recovers when server comes back online
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › critical-path.e2e.ts:286:7 › Error Handling › recovers when server comes back online
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('[data-testid="error-message"]').or(locator('text=/unavailable/i')).first() Expected: visible Timeout: 5000ms Error: element(s) not found

testcase.name: Role-Based Access › admin role sees all UI elements
Role-Based Access › user role sees only assigned items
Security Assertions › no credentials in page source
Security Assertions › no credentials in console logs
Security Assertions › requests include WorfGate headers
Performance Baselines › dashboard loads within 5 seconds
Performance Baselines › navigation between routes completes within 3 seconds
Accessibility Basics › page has proper heading hierarchy
Accessibility Basics › buttons and links are keyboard accessible
